prompt: A surreal, highly detailed sci-fi digital illustration of a white cat with bright yellow eyes sitting on a black and silver robot vacuum cleaner flying through outer space. The cat has a metallic, ribbed cybernetic hose attached to the back of its neck. The robot vacuum is flanked by exactly 2 large, realistic fish acting as rocket boosters, with bright orange flames shooting out of their tails. The background is a vibrant cosmic scene with a starry nebula, streaks of light indicating warp speed, and a fiery exploding planet in the upper left corner. Large vertical Japanese text on the right side reads {argument name="vertical text" default="ネコと和解せよ"} in yellow and white. At the bottom center, large metallic 3D text reads {argument name="main title" default="GERONEKO"}, with smaller white text below it reading {argument name="subtitle" default="Creator of the planet"}. Cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, humorous sci-fi concept art.
translatedPrompt: 一幅超现实科幻数字插画，描绘了一只 {argument name="animal" default="白猫"} 坐在一个 {argument name="vehicle" default="扫地机器人"} 上在深空中飞行。吸尘器两侧配有 {argument name="side boosters" default="两条大金枪鱼"} 作为火箭助推器，它们的尾部喷射出明亮的火焰。一根带肋金属软管将吸尘器连接到猫的脖子上。背景是星光熠熠的宇宙星云、高速光条，左上方有一颗正在剧烈爆炸的行星。右侧的垂直日文文本写着 {argument name="japanese text" default="ネコと和解せよ"}（前两个字符为黄色，其余为白色）。底部中心处有巨大的金属 3D 文本 {argument name="bottom text" default="GERONEKO"}，下方有较小的白色文字写着“Creator of the planet”。电影级光效，超写实纹理。

breakdown.creativeCore: 真空吸尘器火箭上的超现实太空猫：生成一幅高度精细、超现实的科幻场景，描绘一只动物骑着改装后的家用电器在太空中穿行，并可自定义文本。
breakdown.subject: 综合主体
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, 3d, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
